title: elymus × maltei
intro: Elymus × maltei, also known as Malte's wildrye, is a hybrid plant species within the Elymus genus. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus × maltei may include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Elymus × maltei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
